Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-01-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS LAUREEN SCHILLER and ROBERT SCHILLER'S Motion For Summary Judgment is off calendar. Pursuant to the Court's ruling granting Defendants Laureen Schiller, Robert Schiller and Nicholas Schiller's Motion for Terminating Sanctions, on June 13, 2014, judgment was entered in favor of Defendants and against Sarah Dupont. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS LAUREEN SCHILLER, ROBERT SCHILLER AND NICHOLAS SCHILLER'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions will be heard at 9 am on the Discovery calendar. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Defendants Laureen Schiller, Robert Schiller, Nicholas Schiller'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David W. Chen, Esq. of Stratman Patterson & Hunter, Tel. 510.457.3442, for defendants and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Defendant's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. There being no objection, the Court adoted the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS LAUREEN SCHILLER, ROBERT SCHILLER and NICHOLAS SCHILLER'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions is Granted. No opposition filed. Terminating sanctions granted and case dismissed for failure to comply with prior discovery orders. Order signed in open court. Judgment signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS LAUREEN SCHILLER, ROBERT SCHILLER, AND NICHOLAS SCHILLER'S Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition is Granted no opposition. Plaintiff to appear for deposition pursuant to the terms of the prior notice of deposition and demand to produce at the law offices of defense counsel at a mutually convenient time within 10 business days of service of this order upon her. Plaintiff to pay sanctions of $600 at the conclusion of the case. Defendant's order is signed in Court. (See scanned order for details). Judge Pro-tem : Robert Kane; Clerk: M. Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
THE LAW OFFICE OF CRAIG A. KRONER'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF SARAH DUPONT - The motion is off calendar. The Court did not receive a courtesy copy of the motion in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.6B. The proof of service for the motion is scanned on the Court's Register of Actions. That proof of service indicates that counsel mail-served the motion on December 2, 2013. Movant only provided 15 court day notice and failed to comply with CCP 1005(b). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM
